programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Sheriff of Tombstone
programme.desc:
Roy Rogers and George Gabby Hayes in Sheriff of Tombstone 1941
The mayor has sent for a gunslinger who though appearing to clean up the town is really to be the mayors means of taking the town over When Roy and Gabby arrive in Tombstone Roy is mistaken for the gunslinger Just as Roy is ready to expose the mayor the real gunslinger shows up

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Perry Mason The case of the reckless romeo
programme.desc: Sleazy talk show host Ted Mayne has a tell-all book that enrages prominent women One actress Roxanne Shield makes a televised death threat Ted is murdered and she is charged Witnesses say they saw her outside his apartment that night

programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Telltale Talk Show Host
programme.desc: Dr Sheila Carlin is good friends with Della who calls Perry in when she is being pestered by someone On the theory that it could be somebody that she works with at a radio stations she arranges Perry to be interviewed by Winslow Keene who is also the stations owner Winslow enrages the rest of the talk show hosts on the station by informing them of changes that he is making to their time slots That night Winslow is shot by a hit man hired by someone at the station and Sheila is set up for the murder She calls in Perry and as usual Perry Della and Ken swing into action to find out who really did it

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: A town Marshal despite the disagreements of his newlywed bride and the townspeople around him must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon when the gang leader an outlaw he sent up years ago arrives on the noon train

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to the Prime Cut episode a group of recovering cannibals have a relapse and make the unfortunate decision to eat an intruder whos been contaminated with an alien disease

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Indebted unhappy married couple Lou and Irene commit a life insurance fraud Lous brother Billy helps him fake his death and leave for Mexico But Irene and Billy fall in love and when Lou returns they claim they dont know him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A journalist tries to solve the case of a mysterious serial killer whos been killing homeless people all across the city What he doesnt realize is how deep the conspiracy behind the murders goes

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome audio engineer Eric Dunlap hired to install his strange top notch sound system with a mind of its own for an egotistical music conductor Kurt Hoffman but falls hard for Hoffmans beautiful neglected wife Veronica

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Knight Knight
programme.desc: Stonetree is haunted after killing a young robbery suspect as Nick fights off a ghost from his past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A man seeks to increase his intelligence and become a world-renowned scientist but his quest results in the deaths of other researchers

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Howell Industries stock collapse leaves the Howells broke The fellow castaways try to cheer them up and try to teach them how to live like the working class

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While the castaways take precautions against a coming typhoon an accidental blow to the head causes Gilligans mouth to act as a radio receiver

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Luke fears that he may be losing his hair Grandpa employs an unusual tactic to remind Luke that appearances arent as important as he thinks

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: An eccentric area hermit furtively exchanges miscellaneous items for his subsistence but when he trades for McCoy assets Amos has him arrested for theft but is regretful when a hearing to put the man under state supervision ensues

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS agents from all over are each carrying one piece of a bomb that is going to be used against a government base Max has to disarm it

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Hawaiian detective Harry Hoo and Max track his old nemesis The Claw to a San Francisco laundry

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Grant and Steiger scheme to have the seven lady truckers imprisoned in Diablo Countys tough womens prison To spring his friends BJ agrees to a prisoners vs guards football game While Angie is in prison BJ cares for and mentors her rebellious nephew

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger wants to get out of having to take a trip to San Francisco with Kay and The Posts so he tricks Wilbur into believing that Mister Ed is suddenly going bald which in turn makes Ed a nervous wreck

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Kay inherits country property in New York so Roger enters into an agreement to sell their California home and move The purchaser who works for the IRS threatens to sue the Posts if their behavior is not to is liking

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In order to steal enough explosives to blow up a difficult bridge Hogans men paint anti-Nazi graffiti on the camps ammo building

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants to get a peek at the documents that a visiting general has

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While mixing business with pleasure on an island plantation Parker must pose as a Frenchman in order to avoid capture while he reports details on a Japanese radio-jamming operation

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A mix-up with a dictating machine brings a big but poorly-timed Mothers Day surprise for Parker Gruber and Tinker

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter wants his men to pass a promotion test

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Hercules 210
programme.desc: Hercules 210

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: When large scale blackouts begin to occur in cities with portals Taelon technology is blamed Augur and Liam investigate the death of a portal worker by a strange creature that feeds on energy and is particularly attracted to the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Debi is caught up in a fight simulation developed by the aliens to study human creativity

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A vengeful voodoo priestess ensnares Arcane in a voodoo curse as revenge for his enslavement of Jim Kipp who had once saved a cousin of hers from drowning Alec helps Graham and a kindly voodoo priest save Arcane from certain dea

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed psychic comes to the swamp in search of Alec Holland with a message from his dead wife Linda She also reveals that Jim is still alive and will be heard from soon

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Commander John Koenig the new commander of Moonbase Alpha leads the investigation of a mysterious disease at the station and uncovers evidence of a far greater looming disaster

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: Young 307

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two judges and two attorneys have been murdered with a book about disbarment procedures found nearby The detectives find that the killer is a disbarred attorneys son who is executing those he blames for destroying his father

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps Co continue their plan to smash the renegade slavery operation of the absolute ruler of a Middle Eastern nation Phelps posing as a slave trader works his way into the confidence of the ruler In that role Phelps sells Cinnamon into slavery Meanwhile the rest of the IMF team is preparing to pull a switch that will force the rulers brother to confront the situation and force the end of slavery in his nation

programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble saves his boss life garnering the ranch owners powerful protection but Kimble doesnt want his favors because the owners a hit-man gone legit With Lt Gerard closing in the wealthy retired assassin sends the detective in the opposite direction from the fugitive into a trap where Gerard will be taken off the hunt for good

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A poetry-loving stranger on the run from the Cavalry camps out at the Barkley ranch

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into Paradise Springs the town of friendly people When hes greeted with fists instead and has to stand trial he finds the judges wife knows more than shes telling but he remembers her too but doesnt know why

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.desc: Abubakar Mestoev v. Anatoly Lyagu

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Modestas Bukauskas v. Kester Mamba

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ciaran Harrison v. Adeeb Islam

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Trenton Rowell trains out of two different gyms in his small town, perfecting his ground game at one and working his striking at the other. He loves MMA, and is always looking for new ways to grow his skills regardless of his results. Trenton epitomizes Process over Outcome in his training, as he never focuses on the title, but rather simply trying to be in the best shape possible while balancing work, MMA and family life.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Anton Tokarchuk

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Brett Caswell v. Josh Bangert

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The root is starting to wither and the only cure for it is a dose of the ion winds on Solarus II a planet controlled by Saw Boss He destroyed the Solarian people and now uses the healing powers of the winds for his vines

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While stopping on a dead planet looking for Audric the Lightning League crosses path with one of the Vizani a gardener named Faro who with a few seeds and his own power brings life to the planet Saw Boss witnesses this transformation

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Maori Chief Kaitaia has a map to Glow Worm Grotto tattooed on his back VENOM needs this information to find the grotto and steal the pearl treasure inside

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Brothers of Destiny

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Demon Tied by Blood

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While the N team tries to get Simons memory back Mother Brain gets King Hippo and Eggplant Wizard to brainwash him into thinking hes an N-Team hunter Later Simon believes he is Donkey Kong Jr

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The city of Turad is ruled by a demon queen According to an old prophecy she will be defeated only by a child of a stargazer The team is trying to fulfill the prophecy but for them to succeed Diana will have to make a hard choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Eric carelessly opens a magic box thereby summoning the Ultimate Evil which threatens to destroy everything Even Dungeon Master is no match for it

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD may try to use a powerful sneezing weapon against Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents try to convince Gadget that he can replace the King of Pianostan

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades persuade a disgruntled genius to use his new weapon against the Guardians

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kil reduces Leader-1 Scooter and Turbo to the size of toys but when the tiny Guardians escape their enemies must shrink themselves to go in pursuit
